name: Elder Scam Shield Evaluation Config
description: Evaluation criteria for scam detection accuracy, tool trajectory correctness, and response quality.

tool_trajectory_avg_score.description: Average tool trajectory match. Allows minor tool ordering flexibility (e.g., read_contact_list and write_classification may interleave) but requires all expected tools to be called.

response_match_score.description: Content similarity between expected and actual final response. Lower threshold because Japanese text similarity can vary with phrasing while preserving meaning.

final_response_match_v2.rubric: Judge whether the agent's response correctly identifies the classification (safe/suspicious/scam/spam), detects the relevant signals, and extracts stated facts. Award full marks if classification and key signals match. Deduct for missed signals or incorrect classification. Japanese-language responses are acceptable.
final_response_match_v2.description: LLM-as-judge semantic correctness using Gemini 2.5 Flash. Evaluates whether classification, signal detection, and fact extraction are semantically correct regardless of exact wording.

scam_detection_recall.description: Scam cases (obvious_scam_billing, romance_scam_day5) must be classified as scam or suspicious. Target: 95%+ recall on malicious content.

false_positive_rate.description: Safe cases (safe_grandchild_message, safe_clinic_appointment) must NOT be classified as scam or suspicious. Target: <2% false positive rate.
